title: Nice and Cosy
Ceramics Shop
subtitle: Located in Praiano, the heart of the Amalfi Coast, our family-run shop has been crafting fine Italian ceramics since 1960. Discover handmade pottery, decorative plates, and unique souvenirs inspired by Mediterranean tradition.

title: An open-air museum
hiding as a shop
subtitle: Step inside and explore hundreds of original ceramics displayed among lemon trees and sea views. Every piece tells a story of Praiano, where Amalfi Coast art and nature come together.

title: Hand painted
and hand made
subtitle: Each piece is shaped and painted by hand in the centuries-old tradition of Vietri sul Mare. Bring home authentic Italian craftsmanship — from colorful plates to sculptural Moro's heads.
